nasb.text: The length of each curtain was thirty cubits and four cubits the width of each curtain; the eleven curtains had the same measurements.

esv.text: The length of each curtain was thirty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits. The eleven curtains were the same size.

cnv.text: 每一幅幔子長十三公尺，寬兩公尺，十一幅幔子都是一樣的尺寸。

ccb.text: 每幅幔子的尺寸都一样，长十三米、宽两米。
